Name: Timezones
Description: Retrieve information about time zones in different languages
Parameters: {"offset": {"description": "Filter on non daylights savings offset in hours", "type": "string", "default": ""}, "name": {"description": "Filter as \"contains\" on timezone name in chosen language", "type": "string", "default": ""}, "code": {"description": "Filter on 3 letter non daylight savings timezone code (not unique)", "type": "string", "default": ""}, "timezone": {"description": "Filter on timezone name in English", "type": "string", "default": ""}, "daylights_offset": {"description": "Filter on daylights savings offset in hours", "type": "string", "default": ""}, "lang": {"description": "Language selection ISO 639-2 letter code.
